titleStmt.title: SII 17.585: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 585. (A.R. No. 540 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the first prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.

This inscription commences with the praśasti, Kaḍal śūḻnda pārēḻum etc., of Rājādhirāja II. The details of date given, viz. Year 10, Mīṉa śu. 13, Tuesday, Maghā. regularly correspond to 1173 A.D., February 27, Tuesday, ·48; ·65. These details regularly correspond also to 1176 A.D., February 24, Tuesday, ·41; ·85.

This records a grant of land, bought as Irājādhirāja-pperuvilai in Śōḻakēraḷanallūr in Tiruvārūr-kkūṟṟam in Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu as kāṇi to goddess Paralōka ••• meṉmoḻi-nāchchiyār in the shrine of the goddess Tirukkāmakkōṭṭam-uḍaiya Periyanāchchiyār in the temple of god Śrī-mūlasthānamuḍaiyār by Paḻaiyaṉūruḍaiyāṉ Vēdavaṉamuḍaiyāṉ Ammai Appaṉ alias Pallavārājan of Mēṉmalai-paḻaiyaṉūrnāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam (vide No. 583 above).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ .. kaṭal cūḻnta pāreḻun ticaiyeṭṭuṅ kāttu niṉṟu taṭamāmatiyeṉa vi ḷaṅkit taraḷaveṇkuṭainilā veṟippa Āḻvarai varappāka Aṭaṟkaliyaip pilattotukki Ūḻitoṟum pukaḻoṅka Orāḻi veyiṟparappak kayal cilaiyil cāl viḷai ya kaḷiṟāreyiṟ karaṅkuvippap puyalāḻiyiṟ poṟṟiceyya pulimeruvil viṟṟiruppa tiruvāṇaiyuñ ceṅkolun caiyeṭṭuṅ kāval koḷḷapperuvāḻvu peṟṟu yiraṉaittumpiḻai tta kkavarac camaiyamāṟun talaiyeṭuppat tarumamu marumaṟai
yu moṅka Amaivillā maṉuvoḻukka mātiyāmpaṭi nilainiṟka Orppiṉun tammuṟukaṉavi ṉum Oṉṟoṭoṉṟu pakaiyiṉṟip porppuliyum pulvāyum pukkorutuṟai niruṇṇap poṉṉinatiyum poyyātu puyalum puṉalkaravātu maṉṉiya netivaḷam perukka viḷaivayaliṉ vaḷañ curakkap pokapūmi yituveṉṉap pokamellām vantiṇṭi Ekavāṇaiaracurimai Eḻupoḻilkaḷum peṟṟateṉṉap pārkkaṭaliṟ kārkkaṭalppaṭi vāḻamuṭicūṭi Ārtta vamararapiṣekacce
tilaracar tiḷaittāṭa Evvulakamum yiruṇīṅka vanta komāṉivaṉeṉṟu kavvai tirak kalikālat tātikālaṅ kāṭṭiṉaṉeṉ Ivaṉ kākkum puviyaṉaittum yāvaiyum niṉaintiṉṟaruḷi yavaṉ kākkumeṉa Akilalokaṅkaḷum Aṭiyaṭaiyak kulaipaṭu vaṉa teṅkukaḷe koṭpaṭuvaṉa Iḷaṅkamuke Alaipaṭuvaṉa nirnilaiye Atirpaṭuvaṉa Iṭiyeṟe taḷampaṭuvaṉa porvarampe taṭaipaṭuvaṉa kopurame Ūmpaṭuvaṉa cūṉmakaḷire yoṟuppuṇpaṉa matakaḷiṟe taṭuppuṇpaṉa koṭṭakame taḷḷuṇpaṉa
pūṅkoṭiye kaṟaipaṭuvatu niṟaimatiye paṭṭuṇpaṉa Aṇiyalkule parintāṟṟuvapariyākame kuṟaipaṭuvaṉa kuḻaṟcuruḷe kuḻaivillaṉa maṇikkoṅkaiye maṟaipaṭuvaṉa cūḻkāñciye mālkoḷvaṉa vaṇaṅkiṭaiye Eṉṟu pāṭip pārventa riḷaṅkaḷiṟṟiṉ meṟ pokacceṉṟiṟaiñcip pārventar tiruvācaṟpuṟaniṟpacceralarun teṉṉavaruñ ciṅkaḷaruṅ koṅkaṇarum peraracupeṟaveṇṭip piriyātu cevippat tam maracu tām peṟṟut tam muṭaṉe
cūṭiy Ammaruṅkun teviyarkaḷ Aṇimaṅkalam peṟṟaruḷa vāḷaracar talaikākka yātavakula marapil vanta coḷakulamaṇiviḷakkuc coḷakulamāṇikkam maṭanāṇmutaṟkaṇa nāṉkiṉ vaṭivukoṇṭu vaḷavacekaraṉ Uṭaṉāṇaiyun tiruvāṇaiyu muṭaṉcella muṭikavittāḷ maṇṇaracar vantiṟaiñca makuṭam puṉaivaḷavaṉuṭaṉ peṇṇaracum peruntāyamum peṟṟaruḷum peṇperumāḷ Uṟaiyūrum perurakaiyū mutakaiyu maturāpuriyu muṟaimuṟai
yāṇṭaruḷi muḷarinakar tuṟantavaṉṉam poṉṉācaṉañ ciṅkavaṇaipolaṅ kaṟpakappūñ colai muṉṉeval nittal muṟaimuṟaiye peṟumulaipperumāḷ Aḷakanutaṟkayal nayaṉat tampoṟkuḻaikkompeṉṉa Uḷamakiḻa vantaruḷiya Ulakuṭaiya mukkokkiḻā ṉaṭiyuṭaṉ vāḻivāḻi maṇampuṇarntūḻiyūḻi pala voṅkic cempoṉ viraciṅkāsaṉattu Ulakuṭai mukkokkiḻā(n)ṉaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaru
ḷiya kovirājakesaripaṟmarāṉa tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 vatu miṉanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu trayodaśiyuñ cevvāykkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa maka ttunāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu meṉmalaippaḻaiyaṉūrnāṭṭup paḻaiyaṉūruṭai yāṉ vetavaṉamuṭaiyāṉ Ammaiappaṉāṉa pallavarājaṉeṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvārur śrī mūlasthāṉamuṭaiyār koyiṟtiru
kkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiya periyanācciyār koyiliṟ paraloka meṉmoḻinācciyārkku keyamāṇikkavaḷanāṭṭut tiruvārurk kūṟṟattuc coḻakeraḷanallūril nāṉ Irājādhi rājap peruvilaikoṇṭa nantiyararājarumamarakoṉārum Irājarājaviḻupparayarum jiṉatta rayarum vicaiyarāyarum muventayarum puravuvariśrīkaraṇanāyakam kāṉūrkiḻavaṉum tirumantiraolai Irājen
tiramuventaveḷāṉum Eḻuttiṭṭa piramāṇappaṭi nilam nāṟpattoṉṟe ciṉṉamuṅ kāṇiyāka Ikkoyil Āticaṇṭeśvaradevar śrīpādattu nirvārttukkuṭuttamaikku Ivai pallavarājaṉeḻuttu: . ḷa
Digital edition of SII 17.585 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
